tagline: Local metric views (Public Preview): A new dataset type lets you create metric views directly in a dashboard using a low code visual interface, without publishing to Unity Catalog first.
what_it_does: Local metric views (Public Preview): A new dataset type lets you create metric views directly in a dashboard using a low code visual interface, without publishing to Unity Catalog first. Edit hex color values inline: Authors can now click directly on a hex color value to edit it in place. View SQL for visualization widgets: Authors can now view the SQL behind specific visualization widgets while in draft mode.
why_it_matters: Genie Code dataset referencing: Improved the quality of Genie Code for dashboards when referencing datasets while authoring.
